## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss pod rebalancing plan and preparations for quiet week](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pod rebalancing aims to match director/ME strengths, improve account management, and address gaps in technical expertise](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Quiet week next week will be positioned as an "audit week" to clients, with limited publishing for select accounts](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [New reporting structure: MDs will report to Marcel to help strategize pod structures and implement changes](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Need to develop a system for tracking account health across multiple dimensions (relationship, results, execution, project management)](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Pod Rebalancing Plan

  - [4-week transition plan outlined:](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
      - [Week 1 (current): Prep and document account statuses](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
      - [Week 2: Quiet week, internal team notification](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
      - [Week 3: In-office transition meetings with clients](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
      - [Week 4: New pod structure fully in place](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [Adjustments made to maintain some continuity for directors (e.g., Jakub keeping David as ME)](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [Consideration given to technical expertise when assigning accounts (e.g., Darrell's comfort with developer-focused clients)](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
  - [Goal for directors: manage $1.5-2M book of business (125-167K MRR)](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)

### Quiet Week Planning

  - [Position as "audit week" to clients](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=3073.0)
  - [Activities: strategy audits, site audits, competitive analysis](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=3079.0)
  - [Flag accounts that need continued publishing support](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=3101.0)
  - [Use time for new pod preparation and transition planning](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=3115.0)
  - [Test systems and potentially build content backlog](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=3109.0)

### Account Health Tracking

  - [Proposed 4 dimensions to track on 1-5 or 1-10 scale:](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=3136.0)
    1.  Relationship strength
    2.  Account growth and results
    3.  Quality of deliverables
    4.  Project/account management
  - [Focus on tying activities to client's desired outcomes, not just meeting contractual obligations](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=3300.0)

### Individual Account Discussions

  - [Specific accounts discussed for Jakub, Mara, and Darrell](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [Identified accounts needing extra attention or strategy shifts (e.g., Firework pivoting to conversion focus)](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=2521.0)
  - [Noted ME strengths and areas for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Directors to DM Andi accounts that need continued publishing during quiet week](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=3367.0)
  - [Develop and implement account health tracking system](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=3136.0)
  - [Prepare for quiet week activities and client communication](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=3101.0)
  - [Begin transitioning accounts to new pod structures](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [Address identified gaps in director skills (e.g., reporting, technical knowledge)](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=2215.0)
  - [Consider moving Sydney to strategy sprint team in the future](https://fathom.video/share/b39s27ekgw_X1-1DBjgnhukzRMgS7Y_m?tab=summary&timestamp=2969.0)
